explanations.pt-br: Importa PyTorch, similaridade de cosseno, GPT-2/tokenizer e fixa as frases, bloco, head e blocos que serão comparados.
explanations.en-us: Import PyTorch, cosine similarity, GPT-2/tokenizer, and fix the phrases, block, head, and blocks to compare.

explanations.pt-br: Carrega GPT-2 em modo eval e tenta usar atenção eager para que outputs.attentions seja comparável ao cálculo manual.
explanations.en-us: Load GPT-2 in eval mode and try eager attention so outputs.attentions can be compared with the manual calculation.

explanations.pt-br: Mostra os tokens decodificados reais e encontra a posição de people mesmo quando o espaço faz parte do token.
explanations.en-us: Show the real decoded tokens and find the people position even when the leading space is part of the token.

explanations.pt-br: Reconstrói Q, K e V: ln_1 normaliza o hidden de entrada do bloco, c_attn projeta para 3C e split_heads reorganiza para heads.
explanations.en-us: Reconstruct Q, K, and V: ln_1 normalizes the block input hidden state, c_attn projects to 3C, and split_heads rearranges into heads.

explanations.pt-br: Calcula atenção causal manual: scores escalados, máscara triangular, softmax e soma ponderada dos Values.
explanations.en-us: Compute causal attention manually: scaled scores, triangular mask, softmax, and weighted sum of Values.

explanations.pt-br: Executa cada frase com hidden states e attentions ligados, guarda tokens e posição-alvo para a inspeção.
explanations.en-us: Run each phrase with hidden states and attentions enabled, then keep tokens and target position for inspection.

explanations.pt-br: Imprime o raio-X da head: shapes de Q/K/V, preview de Q_i, scores contra cada token permitido, pesos e norma de cada V_j.
explanations.en-us: Print the head X-ray: Q/K/V shapes, Q_i preview, scores against each allowed token, weights, and each V_j norm.

explanations.pt-br: Compara os pesos calculados manualmente com outputs.attentions do Hugging Face para validar a conta.
explanations.en-us: Compare the manually computed weights with Hugging Face outputs.attentions to validate the calculation.

explanations.pt-br: Mede cossenos de Q/K/V do token people entre as duas frases para mostrar como o contexto muda as projeções por bloco.
explanations.en-us: Measure Q/K/V cosines for the people token across the two phrases to show how context changes the projections by block.

explanations.pt-br: Fecha com a fórmula operacional: Q e K escolhem pesos; V é o conteúdo misturado na saída da head.
explanations.en-us: Close with the operational formula: Q and K choose weights; V is the content mixed into the head output.
